programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Supertubos today? A choppy metre or so of onshore wobble; save your energy for the coffee.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WSW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
Might be worth a paddle; hopefully that 1.1m doesn't close out the bay again.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.1m swell with that crosswind suggests a session consisting mostly of paddling and second-guessing decisions.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.1m swell might offer something, but the crosswind suggests a bumpy ride, if any ride at all.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
At 1.1 metres and with that wind, Lagide will likely offer some bumpy rides and closeouts.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 21.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.2m swell with this wind suggests a workout chasing closeouts rather than carving them.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h WNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With onshore breeze and only 1.2m of swell, today's Molhe Leste promises a rather vigorous paddle, and likely little else.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The onshore wind will make those 1.2m waves a bit of a bumpy mess out there today.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.2m and onshore wind, it'll be bumpy, but you might find a closeout or two to entertain yourself.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 10s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 26.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 10s CROSS
programme.desc:
